title: Single-accent theme: canonical tokens, icon system, borderless UI
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Experimental reduction of the theme system to a single accent, with a shared icon set and a borderless control language.

- Collapse theming to one parameterized accent recipe (`--polli-hue`/`--polli-nudge`); drop the `theme=` prop, `ThemeName`, and the fixed accent ramps — one canonical token per function.
- Modality colors become fixed per-modality tokens; modality dots replaced by icons.
- Add a shared icon set (modality, capability, price, wallet, key, globe…) to `@pollinations/ui` and replace every emoji across the dashboard with an icon.
- Borderless controls: `soft` is the default `TabButton`, borderless dropdowns/selects, surface-based elevation.
- Wallet Paid/Tier rendered as icons (gold card / green sprout) instead of dots and badges.
- Dark-mode and contrast pass (warmer charcoal), applied across enter, react, playground, and model-monitor.
- Layout refinements: models table, activity graphs, news/announcements, keys/pollen, model selector.

gist.headline: Fresh coat of paint
gist.blurb: We've stripped back the clutter and given the dashboard a sleek, borderless redesign. Say goodbye to scattered emojis and hello to a crisp new icon system.
gist.summary: Simplified the UI theme system to a single parameterized accent, replaced all dashboard emojis with a custom icon set, and rolled out borderless controls across the playground and model monitor.
gist.impact: You'll notice a cleaner, warmer dark mode, sleeker borderless dropdowns, and crisp new icons for wallets and models instead of the old colored dots.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a designer/painter, cleaning up a workspace. Representing the 'single accent' and 'borderless' UI by having her paint a single bright lime green line on a clean, floating canvas, replacing cluttered items.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, using a brush to paint a glowing lime green (#ecf874) accent line on a clean, borderless floating digital canvas. A cute chunky monitor robot watches happily, holding a palette of soft pastels. Soft lavender and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
